reviews.review_description: i'm gonna start the game i spawn under stump for some reason can you fix this please also i glitched the game to escape there but my hands don't escapes the bottom of stump so yeah i just couldn't play the game sadly but can you just fix it it'd be really nice
I like simple games like this and it’s really fun

reviews.review_title: This game is kinda fun/copy of big scary
reviews.review_description: So this game is basically a copy of big scary but with there own twist they have there own shop but with the same cosmetics,also they have there own colored monster. Overall this game is not bad it just needs to be original and have public lobby’s so I would recommend this game also do y’all have a discord?!

developer_response.body: No we do not have a discord
